headline: Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund Announces Appointment of Michael J. Hennigan as New Independent Director
summary: HOUSTON, May 12, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund, Inc. (the “Company” or “KYN”) announced today the appointment of Michael J. Hennigan as an independent director of the Company, effective immediately. Following the retirements of William R. Cordes and Barry R. Pearl earlier this year, the appointment of Mr. Hennigan brings the Company’s Board to six members, five of whom are independent. Michael J. Hennigan is a highly accomplished energy executive, with severa

headline: Iran War Truce Fragile as US Rejects Tehran’s Latest Offer
summary: (Bloomberg) -- US President Donald Trump is showing signs of frustration at a lack of progress in negotiations to end the 10-week war with Iran, as the Strait of Hormuz remains all but closed to vital energy supplies and oil prices continue to rise.Most Read from BloombergInside a Year of Chaos and Conflict at Kevin Hart’s Media CompanyIran Makes New Offer on Uranium in Response to US, WSJ SaysAmbani’s Cola War With Coke, Pepsi Spurs Fridge Bonanza in IndiaNvidia’s CEO to Miss China Trip After Y

headline: MPC Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Refining Results
summary: Marathon Petroleum tops Q1 estimates as refining margins surge, while a new $5B buyback boosts total repurchase capacity.

headline: US To Loan Over 50 Million Barrels From Strategic Reserve To Ease Iran War Oil Shock
summary: The US is set to loan 53.3 million SPR barrels to energy firms as Iran war drives oil prices higher and markets tighten.

raw.headline: US To Loan Over 50 Million Barrels From Strategic Reserve To Ease Iran War Oil Shock

headline: Marathon Petroleum Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) reported stronger first-quarter 2026 results, with management pointing to improved refinery reliability, elevated refining margins and a favorable supply-demand backdrop shaped in part by geopolitical disruptions in the Middle East.
